title: French Orange and Crispy Spanish Soup
description: A refreshing French-inspired soup made with oranges and crispy Spanish ingredients, perfect for a light meal or snack.
instructions: Heat the Spanish Olive Oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the sliced Onion and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced Garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the Fresh Oranges, peeled and chopped, along with the Chicken or Vegetable Broth.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and let simmer for 15-20 minutes.
Use an immersion blender to puree the soup until smooth.
Stir in the Tangy Crème Fraîche and season with Salt and Pepper to taste.
Garnish with Fresh Thyme and crispy Spanish Crostini.
